intro.title: About
intro.subtitle: Everything that makes up Ingeri's deep identity: our philosophy, our team and our commitments.

mission.heading: Our mission
mission.body: Sowing the seeds of excellence from early childhood. We support every child in their holistic development — spiritual, emotional, intellectual, social and motor — within a safe, loving and stimulating environment.

vision.heading: Our vision
vision.body: To become a reference network of educational spaces in Rwanda and Africa, recognised for pedagogical quality, Christian values and innovation adapted to our local context.

items.title: Child-centred
items.desc: Every child is unique. The adult observes, encourages and supports without imposing.

items.title: Christian foundation
items.desc: Patience, respect, humility, joy and forgiveness at the heart of every day.

items.title: The bond
items.desc: Child–educator, child–family: shared trust creates security.

items.title: Connection to nature
items.desc: Gardening, natural objects: nature nurtures wonder.

items.title: Autonomy and dignity
items.desc: The child learns to 'do it alone' and to trust themselves.

leadership.title: The
leadership.p1: At Ingeri, leadership is in the service of the child. Every pedagogical decision is guided by a single question: is this the best for the child?
leadership.p2: Our leadership team deeply believes that early childhood education is the most precious investment one can make for a generation.
leadership.quote: Every child is a promise of the future. Our role is to honour that promise.

equipe.title: Our
equipe.subtitle: Committed women — mothers and professionals — in the service of your children.

carrieres.title: Careers at
carrieres.teamQuote: Working at Ingeri means feeling every day that your work has meaning.
carrieres.ctaDesc: Do you share our values of kindness, excellence and faith? Send us your application.
